extortion.description: Our expertise in international sourcing enables us to access products from pulse and grain producing countries in North & South America, Eastern & Western Europe, Latin America, East & Far East Asia, Africa and the Middle East.  Suppliers and buyers can also always be assured of fair and just dealings when working with GEDCO, knowing they can rely on GEDCO’s performance and can trust compliance with the quality of the products purchased.Our main export market focus is the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), which includes Algeria, Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Morocco, Libya, Tunisia, Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia and Yemen.Proudly a Canadian family trading company, bringing in over 100 years of experience in the industry, GEDCO was founded in 1984 by Mr. Mohamed Reda and Mrs. Haifa Reda. Since its inception, GEDCO has specialized in the trade of lumber, agricultural products and pulses. Second generation partners, Mr. Saleh Reda and Ms. Iman Reda, soon ambitiously expanded the company’s product base to include spices, dried fruit, nuts, rice and milk powder.Geo: Canada - Leak size: 17,5 GB Archive - Contains: SQL
